land_use: Mixed-use downtown core; hospitality, condo towers, office, and retail within a few blocks of the Gardiner / harbour.
transit: Union Station ~10 min walk; 504 King streetcar; PATH connections nearby.
walkability: High; dense grid, food and entertainment on Front / Jarvis / The Esplanade.
hospitality_context: Established short-stay and boutique hotel demand from downtown leisure and convention spillover; competition from condo-hotel and STRs within 3 km.
constraints: Harbourfront / St. Lawrence heritage adjacency may raise design scrutiny.
Gardiner Expressway proximity: noise and air-quality considerations for guest rooms.
Flood / stormwater: waterfront district drainage capacity during extreme rainfall.

sources.label: Site pack: 45 The Esplanade neighbourhood notes
